'''Kheann''' was one of the wives of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred]] of [[Kashir]].

Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|clone wars]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and his master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] were sent to a meeting with [[Sha-Mar Ma-dred|King Sha-Mar Ma-dred]]. As the jedi approached the king, Kheann and the other wives ([[Tiarri]], [[Mirrix]] and [[Ashala Ma-dred|Ashala]]) were present. 

The wives left before the meeting to do as they wished. That night she heard as [[Tiarri]] screamed "[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|An Intruder]]". Kheann and [[Mirrix]] pushed [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] to the ground and took out their knives. 

Anakin explained that his [[Anakin Skywalker's first lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] was stolen by someone. Kheann told him only [[Ashala Ma-dred|one of them]] would be bold to steal a weapon of a jedi diplomat.
